nasb.text: O Lord, my strength and my stronghold, And my refuge in the day of distress, To You the nations will come From the ends of the earth and say, “Our fathers have inherited nothing but falsehood, Futility and things of no profit.”

esv.text: O Lord, my strength and my stronghold, my refuge in the day of trouble, to you shall the nations come from the ends of the earth and say: “Our fathers have inherited nothing but lies, worthless things in which there is no profit.

cnv.text: 耶和華，我的力量、我的堡壘、 我遭難時的避難所啊！ 萬國要從地極前來朝見你，說： “我們列祖所承受的只是虛假的偶像， 是虛空、一無用處的。

ccb.text: 耶和华啊，你是我的力量， 是我的堡垒， 是我患难时的避难所。 万国都要从地极来朝见你， 说：“我们祖先所拜的神像虚假无用，一无是处。
